# Golden-image test fixtures for the grading module.
#
# Place three JPEG images here:
#
#   fresh.jpg      — perfect red tomatoes, coin in frame, good lighting
#                    Expected grade: A
#
#   blemished.jpg  — tomatoes with cracks, spots, or uneven color, coin in frame
#                    Expected grade: B
#
#   waste.jpg      — rotting, moldy, or severely damaged tomatoes
#                    Expected grade: WASTE
#
# Source royalty-free or photograph your own.
# The live-gated tests in ../test_grading.py will skip if these files
# are not present.
#
# See the slice plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-11-trace-slice-c-grading.md
